chunks.title: The Six Executioners Arrive
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival of six men with weapons and a scribe clothed in linen.

chunks.title: The Marking and Slaughter Command
chunks.reason: Contains the glory of God moving to the threshold and the specific commands given to the scribe and executioners.

chunks.title: Ezekiel's Plea and God's Response
chunks.reason: Features Ezekiel falling in prayer and Yahweh explaining the extent of Israel's iniquity.

chunks.title: Completion of the Task
chunks.reason: Reports the scribe confirming the completion of the command.
